top_tweets.text:
product management tip: ragebaiting your user base/player base by making inaccurate claims about the quality of your systems is an incredibly fast way of identifying current problems with your software that you can then prioritize fixes for

easily the top reason I’m on here
top_tweets.author: drewlevin
top_tweets.name: Drew Levin
top_tweets.summary_zh: 產品管理技巧：在社群媒體上故意發布對系統品質的不準確說法來激怒用戶，可以快速識別出軟體的當前問題，進而排定修復優先順序。

top_tweets.text:

Yesterday Anthropic launched Claude Design.

A direct Figma
top_tweets.author: TheGeorgePu
top_tweets.name: George Pu

top_tweets.text:
The AI debate is difficult because one side views art as a product to be delivered as fast as possible. 

It's like going to a lake and telling fisherman that it's "more efficient" to buy fish from the grocery store. They aren't just there for the fish.
top_tweets.author: sean_gause
top_tweets.name: Sean // Hear Tell of Hauntings🥀
top_tweets.summary_zh: AI 辯論的困難在於一方把藝術視為「應盡快交付的產品」，就像對釣魚的人說去超市買魚更有效率——他們在乎的不只是魚本身。

top_tweets.text:
My world view for some time has been that sales and marketing will become the most important role at companies in an AI world

If anyone can vibe code a new software platform, there is no product moat. 

For enterprise, the edge is having a better sales team that can sell that https://t.co/83rdLN0KK2
top_tweets.author: BoringBiz_
top_tweets.name: Boring_Business
top_tweets.summary_zh: 在 AI 時代，銷售與行銷將成為公司最重要的角色。當任何人都能 vibe code 出軟體平台時，產品本身不再是護城河，企業的優勢在於擁有更強的銷售團隊。

top_tweets.text: Love vibe coding games. It gives me a deep appreciation for the time and effort that have gone into traditional games. It's clear that the majority of effort is spent tweaking stats, game play, story writing, level editing, narrative creation, etc. The long tail of polish.
top_tweets.author: martin_casado
top_tweets.name: martin_casado
top_tweets.summary_zh: Vibe coding 遊戲讓我深刻體會傳統遊戲開發的時間與心力投入，大部分精力花在調整數值、玩法、故事、關卡編輯、敘事等，長尾的打磨工作才是關鍵。

top_tweets.text: Kubernetes isn't a scam. People don't just realize what it is, and what it brought to the world. What Kubernetes did to the world is to teach and bring Control System theory to the masses. With control system, you could run software at scale like never before. If you design your
top_tweets.author: fatih
top_tweets.name: Fatih Arslan
top_tweets.summary_zh: Kubernetes 不是騙局，它將控制系統理論（Control System Theory）帶給大眾，讓軟體能以前所未有的規模運行。如果你設計系統時理解這點，就能真正發揮其價值。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
